children.heading: Submission and contents of applications
children.label: a Submission and contents of applications

children.text: a program of activities for carrying out one or more of the purposes described in in such detail as will enable the Secretary to determine the degree to which such program will accomplish such purpose or purposes; andsection 1067a(b) of this title
such other policies, procedures, and assurances as the Secretary may require by regulation.

children.heading: Approval based on likelihood of progress
children.label: b Approval based on likelihood of progress
children.text: The Secretary shall approve an application only if the Secretary determines that the application sets forth a program of activities which are likely to make substantial progress toward achieving the purposes of this part.
